prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-PENFLEXIBLEWRITINGTOOL-6 Product Type: WRITING_INSTRUMENT Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal 25pk Non-Lethal Flexible Ballpoint Pen Writing Tool, Black Ink Description: The Non-Lethal Flexible Ball Point Pens are a great option for providing a basic need in safe and responsible way for incarcerated inmates of jails, prisons, government detention centers, and mental health facilities.

There is virtually no way to utilize these pens as a deadly weapon, they are essential writing tools for patients who may be prone to hurting themselves or others around them.

These reliable flexible ball point pens are made with a soft bendable outer casing that does not harden, but melts when exposed to open flame; its rubbery material folds under pressure and is only 4.25 inches in length, making it nearly impossible to do lethal damage with. Ball point ink color is available in black or blue. Assembled in USA Search Terms: non lethal rubber flexible prison pen bendable ball point pen inmate safety pencil safe writing instrument corrections government mental health psych inpatient harm flex ink Features: - INSTITUTIONAL SAFETY PEN: These non lethal bendable ink pens are an essential writing tool that allows for a basic need to be provided to people that may be prone to hurting themselves and others - NON-LETHAL BENDABLE PEN: Designed to bend and flex under pressure while only being 4.25 inches in length, this flexible ball point pen maintains the highest safety standards - INK FLOW WRITING CAPACITY: Each non-lethal jail pen contains a ink tube capable of writing up to 3500 feet before needing to be replaced or disposed - JAIL PEN SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 4.25 inches; Weight: 0.001 oz; Ink Color: Blue or Black - ASSEMBLED IN THE USA === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Federal 25-pk Non-Lethal Flexible Ballpoint Pen, Black
